title: Clean and graph your temperature logs
description: Parse your log file, smooth noisy readings, and annotate the highs and lows so the chart tells a clearer story than raw numbers alone.

dialogue.text: Nice work gathering data! Let's improve that basic chart by cleaning and annotating the readings.
Parse the log into timestamps and readings, smooth noisy spikes with a rolling average, and label daily highs and lows before plotting the result.
Great! Visuals make patterns easy to spot. Keep logging and graphing for deeper insight.
